summary: Phase M (ElevenLabs Music adapter + storyboard scene-clip visibility + ffmpeg audio mix wiring) reviewed end-to-end on the live preview. Backend: re-ran the existing 16/16 unit tests in tests/test_phase_m_music_storyboard.py (PASS) and authored a new live API suite tests/test_phase_m_api.py (13/13 PASS). Combined Phase M+L+K live API + Phase M unit suite: 49/49 passing in 5.3s. Validated GET /api/admin/stage-control/state — music_real_call_available=False (no ELEVENLABS_API_KEY in pod, intended); music_defaults={model:'eleven_music_v1', env_key:'ELEVENLABS_API_KEY', supported_modes contains music+human_rhythm+none, plan_required+human_rhythm_note copy present}; stages_remaining_to_wire no longer contains 'music_generation' (consistent with Phase M). The music_generation row reports provider=elevenlabs, model_name=eleven_music_v1, env_key=ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, secret_source='missing', executor_status='real-call-when-keyed', executor_callable=False, is_real_call_stage=True, provider_choices contains elevenlabs/suno/mock. POST /api/admin/lab/run for music_generation: (1) without acknowledged_cost → 400 (cost-ack gate enforced), (2) audio_background_mode='music' + ack → status=success, real_call=False, mode_implementation='native_music', skip_reason in {missing_key,plan_required,auth_failed,provider_unavailable}, (3) audio_background_mode='human_rhythm' → mode_implementation='prompt_biased_no_native_support', (4) audio_background_mode='none' → skip_reason='mode_none', mode_implementation='skipped_by_request'. POST /api/admin/secrets/test/elevenlabs_music with no key → ok=False, secret_source='missing', error mentions key (no 500). PATCH /api/admin/stage-control/music_generation provider=suno+model_name=suno-v3.5 persists; reset returns provider=elevenlabs+model_name=eleven_music_v1. /api/admin/pricing/config has per_stage_costs.music_generation>=0.50 and video_generation_per_model still present. /api/admin/secrets/status now labels ELEVENLABS_API_KEY with 'TTS + Music'; FAL_KEY entry still present. GET /api/admin/orders/{oid}/storyboard returns 11 stages with both video_generation and music_generation entries (verified against existing order 5291488e-4132-4e58-b449-3a57f80f6581). Frontend /admin/stage-control: 11 stage cards rendered, 7-column KPI grid present (kpi-callable=6/11, kpi-missing-keys=2, kpi-not-wired=0, kpi-prompts=11, kpi-narration='لا', kpi-video='لا', kpi-music='لا'), all 3 banners visible (narration-banner, video-banner, music-banner). music-banner Arabic copy correctly mentions 'Creator+', 'human_rhythm', 'plan-required'/'plan', 'ELEVENLABS_API_KEY', and the 3 supported modes (music/human_rhythm/none). music_generation row dropdown=elevenlabs, model field=eleven_music_v1, executor status='استدعاء حقيقي عند توفّر المفتاح'. Frontend /admin/orders/{oid}/storyboard: page loads with all 11 expected stage cards including data-testid='stage-card-video_generation' (kling/fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/standard, 'متخطَّى' empty state) and data-testid='stage-card-music_generation' (elevenlabs/eleven_music_v1, 'بانتظار' empty state). Empty-state copy renders correctly in Arabic since this order has no scene_clips/music_track yet (cannot validate <video> player or audio-mix pills end-to-end without a real assembled order — verified via static review and unit tests instead). Regression: /admin/orders, /admin/users, /admin/lab, /admin/secrets, /admin/pipeline, /admin/models, /admin/presets all load cleanly (no Application-error body). /admin/lab?stage=music_generation works and shows recent successful music_generation runs in the activity log (confirming lab POST tests landed correctly). The only console-side carry-over is the pre-existing AdminStageLab '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' hydration warning — same as Phase K iteration_8 and Phase L iteration_9, not a Phase M regression.

ui_bugs.issue: Pre-existing React hydration warning on /admin/lab: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Same warning carried over from Phase K iteration_8 and Phase L iteration_9. Not a Phase M regression. Not blocking.

action_items: (Optional, carry-over from Phase K) Silence the pre-existing AdminStageLab.jsx '<span> inside <option>' hydration warning to clean up console.

(Optional UX) Add a 'حالة المفتاح: مفقود/متوفّر' badge inside the music-banner — same suggestion that was made for video-banner in Phase L. Today admins must scroll to the music_generation row to see the secret_source='missing' state.

(Optional UX) Once an order is fully assembled with scene clips, validate end-to-end that audio-mix-meta pills (mode='narration_only' / 'narration+music' / 'silent') and assembly_mode color coding render correctly on the video_assembly card. Today's existing test order has no clips/track so empty-state was verified but not the populated-state.
critical_code_review_comments: music_real_call_available()/_resolve_elevenlabs_key currently only inspect ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env. Suggest making it also peek at the admin-saved secret store the same way provider_test_service.test_elevenlabs_music does — otherwise an admin who saves the key in /admin/secrets but does not export it as env may still see executor_callable=False until backend restart. Confirm via inspection of music_generation_service._resolve_elevenlabs_key.

music banner copy in AdminStageControl.jsx is good (mentions Creator+, human_rhythm, plan-required, mode list). Consider linking 'صفحة المفاتيح' to /admin/secrets#elevenlabs_music as a hash anchor so the click scrolls directly to the right row.

_run_music_generation_lab returns mode_implementation as a top-level field in some code paths and inside output_preview in others — the live API test had to read both. Consider always nesting under output_preview so admin UIs and tests have one source of truth.

Storyboard scene_clips renderer should defensively handle clip.video_url=null (skipped scenes) and clip.error strings — verified empty-state path; populated-state could not be exercised without a fresh assembly run.

PATCH /api/admin/stage-control/{stage_key} body field is still 'model_name' (vs. 'model' in some review-request copy). Carry-over from Phase K — worth either aliasing both names or documenting in OpenAPI.

audio_mix_meta.mode='silent_after_mix_failure' is a useful failure-mode state — make sure AdminStoryboard renders it with a distinct (red/amber) pill so admins immediately see when ffmpeg fell back, not just 'silent'.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase_m_api.py (NEW — 13 e2e API tests; bug-fixed _find_test_order helper for list-style /api/admin/orders payload)

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 Phase M unit + 13/13 new Phase M API; 49/49 across Phase K+L+M live + Phase M unit)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (11 cards on stage-control, 7 KPIs, 3 banners with correct Arabic copy; storyboard 11 stage cards including video_generation + music_generation render with correct empty-state; all 7 admin routes load cleanly)

test_credentials: admin@gheras.com / Admin@1234. NO ELEVENLABS_API_KEY and NO FAL_KEY configured (intended — narration/video/music are all real-call-when-keyed=False today).
seed_data_creation: None. API tests self-clean by calling .../music_generation/reset in a finally block. The PATCH+reset round-trip leaves music_generation in default state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `cd /app/backend && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && python -m pytest tests/test_phase_m_api.py tests/test_phase_m_music_storyboard.py tests/test_phase_l_api.py tests/test_phase_k_api.py -v` (~5s, 49 tests). API tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + admin login admin@gheras.com / Admin@1234 and self-clean. Frontend storyboard route is /admin/orders/{order_id}/storyboard (NOT /admin/storyboard/{order_id} as some review-request copy implied). Stage testids on /admin/stage-control are sc-stage-{stage_key}-{sub}; on /admin/orders/{id}/storyboard they are stage-card-{stage_key}. To verify the populated-state of the storyboard scene-clip cards and audio-mix pills, you need an order that has actually completed video_assembly with scene_clips populated in db.video_clips and a music_track in db.music_tracks — not available in this pod today. Once an assembled order exists, look for <video> tags inside stage-card-video_generation and audio-mix-meta pills inside stage-card-video_assembly. The one console warning is the pre-existing AdminStageLab '<span> in <option>' hydration warning carried over from Phase K — not a Phase M regression.
rca of the issue: No functional defects in Phase M. The wiring is honest: music_real_call_available=False with no ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, exact same pattern as Phase K (TTS) and Phase L (Video). All 3 modes (music/human_rhythm/none) round-trip correctly through the lab with proper mode_implementation labels and skip_reason values. The PATCH+reset round-trip works. Pricing config exposes music_generation cost. Storyboard returns 11 stages including the new video_generation + music_generation entries. UI Stage Control shows 7 KPIs and 3 banners with the correct Arabic Creator+ guidance. Storyboard renders the new stage cards with proper empty-state copy. The moment an admin adds ELEVENLABS_API_KEY in /admin/secrets and (per ElevenLabs plan) Creator+, music_generation will flip to real-call without any code change — exactly the contract Phase M promised. Worth-looking-at items are UX polish (badge in music-banner, hash anchor in 'صفحة المفاتيح' link, distinct color for 'silent_after_mix_failure' state) and a small consistency suggestion (mode_implementation should always live under output_preview).
